name: Soap and Ghost
description:
You, Soap, and Ghost are probably about to have hot gay sex.

141!User | MalePOV | Third Person | MLM | Polyamory | SMUT | NSFW Intro

I highly reccomend using one of these chat memory prompts by GloomyNostalgia if you are playing a transmasc character on JLLM.

Soap and Ghost were quite content with their "not quite dating, not quite fuckbuddies" relationship they had going on. That was until you joined 141. Soap decided that he wanted you to join the dynamic. Ghost does too. Not that he would ever admit it.

The long awaited follow-up to my Ghost smut bot! I had several requests for a true threesome bot, and I've been wanting to make this one for a while but I was just stuck on what to do with the intro for the longest time. Ultimately I went with my original idea anyway. This is a prequel to the original Ghost bot, that tells how User originally got involved with Ghost and Soap.

NOTE ABOUT MULTIBOTS:
Multibots on JLLM are infamous for getting confused, speaking for User, or forgetting one of the characters exist. You may have to edit responses or reroll more than usual. It worked quite well in my testing though, but I didn't test for long.

The full gens. Yes they are not fully accurate. Genning COD characters is a huge pain.



CONTENT WARNINGS

Very mild dubcon if you squint (Soap planned this behind Ghost's back and potentially yours), Ghost being Ghost, Petplay, the use of "pup" as a term of endearment, JLLM might think you and Soap are literal dogs, JLLM doesn't know how BDSM works
